title: 2 Rolls Cling Film for Food 30cm x 100m, Suitable for Quaszwia Brand Clingfilm Dispenser, Practical Kitchen Food Seal Wrap, Essential Cook's Tools for Food Storage & Preparation. (Pack of 2)
features: ✅ SAFE GRADE MATERIALS: Our cling film is made from professional food grade materials(BPA free). It can contact food safely no matter in refrigerator or normal temperature. Easy and clean cutting with the Quasziwa brand cling film dispenser!

✅ KEEP FOOD FRESH LONGER: Extends foods' freshness with our cling film. Our kitchen cling film can keep air out with tight seal to extend the food’s freshness and reserve the flavor for longer. Also it will prevent odors from seeping out in freezer.

✅ COMPATIBLE & ADJUSTABLE: Measures 30cm x 100 m each roll, 1 pack contains 2 rolls of cling film. The food cling film fits nicely across most containers for better coverage such as ceramic plates, glass bowls and other small items, appropriate size for home use.

✅ DURABLE&STRONG - With thicker surface and excellent produce process,food cling wrap is durable and strong enough to cater kitchen or household need perfectly. It has a excellent tensile ability, which can prevent the liquid from spilling out.

✅ REDUCE FOOD WASTE: Wraps are ideal for keeping air out with tight seal for extend food freshness and also preventing odours from seeping out. Suitable for all food storage, protection and preservation needs at home, cafes, food delivery services, hotels, restaurants and professional catering outfits.
